RESOLUTION.DESC:
[b]The Security Council,[/b]
[b]Acknowledging[/b] that the nation of [nation]sambuca[/nation] has been removed from NUK or known as [region]New United Kingdom[/region] for impersonating Officers of the region to gain influence, spreading information against the Queen of NUK and engaging in acts of Destruction and crisis for the [region]New United Kingdom[/region]
[b]Observing[/b] that [nation]sambuca[/nation] has been to many regions and done acts near to the same in [region]New United Kingdom[/region]. As in most cases the nation was removed and expelled permanently.
[b]Noting[/b] Sambuca unreliability makes the nation unsuitable for any position of authority and must be noticed for all.
Herby condemns [u]Sambuca[/u]
RESOLUTION.NAME: Condemn Sambuca
